entries.name: PartialRatio_both_empty
entries.derivation_note: both-empty / identity short-circuit → 1.0 (PartialRatio does NOT inherit TokenSetRatio's RapidFuzz issue #110 deviation)

entries.name: PartialRatio_region_2_middle_wins
entries.derivation_note: Region 2 at i=9 → indelRatio("YANKEES","YANKEES")=1.0 — RapidFuzz canonical reference

entries.name: PartialRatio_region_1_left_tail_pitfall_3
entries.derivation_note: 06-RESEARCH.md Pitfall 3 KEYSTONE — Region 2 at i=0 → indelRatio("ab","ab")=1.0 (regression: naive single-loop missing Region 1 would fail this)

entries.name: PartialRatio_region_3_right_tail_pitfall_3
entries.derivation_note: 06-RESEARCH.md Pitfall 3 KEYSTONE — Region 2 at i=1 → indelRatio("bc","bc")=1.0 (regression: naive single-loop missing Region 3 would fail this)

entries.name: PartialRatio_disjoint_no_overlap
entries.derivation_note: charSet={'a','b','c'}; longer="xyzzz" has no matching bytes; all alignments skipped → best=0.0
